content.text: Please implement the store refactoring as described in the plan.

content.thinking: Let me think about how to approach this refactoring. I need to consider the three-tier structure and how resolve() maps resource names to file paths. This thinking block should be ignored by the enrichment script since it is internal reasoning and not part of the visible output.

content.text: I will start by reading the current store.sh implementation to understand the existing resolve() function and plan the refactoring. The goal is to restructure .kiss-claw/ into three subdirectories: agents/, project/, and sessions/. Each directory will hold specific resource types, and environment variables will allow customizing the paths.

J'ai choisi de restructurer resolve() en utilisant un case statement avec trois branches principales plutot que de maintenir une liste de if/elif. Cette approche est plus lisible et plus facile a maintenir. Les alternatives considerees etaient : (1) un tableau associatif bash, mais cela aurait limite la compatibilite avec les anciens shells, et (2) un fichier de configuration externe, mais cela ajouterait une dependance fichier inutile.

Here is the summary of resource mapping after refactoring:

| Resource | Directory | File |
|---|---|---|
| memory | project/ | MEMORY.md |
| memory:kiss-orchestrator | agents/ | MEMORY_kiss-orchestrator.md |
| memory:kiss-executor | agents/ | MEMORY_kiss-executor.md |
| plan | sessions/$ID/ | PLAN.md |
| state | sessions/$ID/ | STATE.md |
| reviews | sessions/$ID/ | REVIEWS.md |
| checkpoint | sessions/$ID/ | CHECKPOINT.yaml |

All paths are resolved relative to KISS_CLAW_DIR, with optional overrides via environment variables.

One caveat to note: the reverse_map() function currently does not handle the sessions/ subdirectory correctly when KISS_CLAW_SESSION is not set. This is a limitation that should be addressed in a follow-up step. The issue manifests as an empty path resolution for session-scoped resources, which causes store.sh to silently fail rather than producing a clear error message.

Verdict : approved-with-notes
REV-0003 — store.sh resolve() coverage is good but guard.sh has gaps in the new session-scoped paths. reverse_map() edge case with unset KISS_CLAW_SESSION should be fixed before merging. Overall quality is solid.

=== TASK REPORT ===
Agent  : kiss-executor
Task   : Refactorer store.sh resolve() pour 3 categories avec variables d'env
Done   :
  - scripts/store.sh modified: resolve() refactored with 3-tier mapping
  - scripts/store.sh modified: reverse_map() updated for new structure
  - scripts/store.sh modified: require_session() added for clear error on missing session
  - scripts/store.sh modified: token-stats resource removed
Caveats: reverse_map() edge case with unset KISS_CLAW_SESSION
==================
